name: aberdeen-1995-hp-softbench
title: Hewlett-Packard's C++ SoftBench 5.0 -- A Powerful Platform for Professional Developers
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group's December 1995 executive white paper evaluating HP's C++ SoftBench 5.0 IDE. Contains structured observations, entity status tracking, and technology lifecycle assessments extracted from the original PDF.

sources.title: Hewlett-Packard's C++ SoftBench 5.0 -- A Powerful Platform for Professional Developers
sources.author: Aberdeen Group

resources.name: studies
resources.title: Studies
resources.description: Metadata for the source research study

fields.name: type
fields.description: Study type code; see codes.csv study_type

fields.name: domain
fields.description: Research domain code; see codes.csv domain

fields.name: methodology
fields.description: Comma-separated methodology codes; see codes.csv methodology

resources.name: entities
resources.title: Entities
resources.description: Organizations and companies mentioned in the study with current status as of 2026

fields.name: name
fields.description: Entity name as referenced or current legal name

fields.name: role
fields.description: Role of entity in the study context

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status code; see codes.csv entity_status

fields.name: status_note
fields.description: Narrative explanation of current entity status

resources.name: technologies
resources.title: Technologies
resources.description: Technologies, products, standards and platforms mentioned in the study with current lifecycle status

fields.name: lifecycle_status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status code; see codes.csv tech_lifecycle

fields.name: lifecycle_note
fields.description: Narrative explanation of current lifecycle status

resources.name: observations
resources.title: Observations
resources.description: Structured claims, findings, and analyst statements extracted from the study

fields.name: section
fields.description: Section of the source document containing the observation

fields.name: observation_type
fields.description: Type code for the observation; see codes.csv obs_type

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Primary subject or topic of the observation

fields.name: claim
fields.description: The verbatim or paraphrased claim or finding

fields.name: evidence_type
fields.description: Type of evidence supporting the claim

fields.name: sentiment
fields.description: Sentiment of the observation; see codes.csv sentiment

resources.name: codes
resources.title: Codes
resources.description: Reference codelist defining all controlled vocabulary values used across CSV files

fields.name: code_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the code entry

fields.name: code_type
fields.description: Category of code (e.g., observation_type, sentiment, entity_status)
